content: Docker: 5 containers (web, worker, postgres, redis, martin). PostgreSQL 16 + PostGIS 3.4 (postgis/postgis:16-3.4-alpine). Health check must use wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:3000/ (Alpine resolves localhost to ::1)
Migration NOT automatic in Docker — run DATABASE_URL=... pnpm migrate from host against exposed port 5432. Migrations are in apps/web/src/lib/server/db/migrations/ (0000-0009)
BullMQ 5 + ioredis + Redis 7 for job queue. Worker is a separate service at services/worker/. Logging via pino (structured JSON) in hooks.server.ts — requests >500ms logged automatically

name: import pipeline shared tail
description: createLayerAndInsertFeatures() in import/shared.ts — shared tail for all 5 import modules (detect type, auto-style, create layer, batch-insert with progress, get bbox). Accepts layerTypeOverride for CSV. GeoPackage WKB path excluded (uses insertWkbFeatures).

content: mulch record CLI flags vary by type: pattern requires --name and --description; decision requires --title and --rationale; convention requires --name and --description. All types accept --evidence-commit and --evidence-bead. Domain must be one of: sveltekit, maplibre, drizzle, testing, infrastructure.

description: Docker Compose ports: [] in override file is a no-op — lists are merged, not replaced. DB/Redis/Martin remain publicly accessible in production.
resolution: Use ports: !reset [] (Compose v2.24+) to actually clear base ports in override files.

description: Redis healthcheck (redis-cli ping) fails with NOAUTH when requirepass is set, blocking all dependent services.
resolution: Set REDISCLI_AUTH env var on the Redis service — redis-cli reads it automatically for authentication.

description: Docker build (ghcr.io push) fails silently when a Svelte component imports a file that doesn't exist — nohup backgrounding + set -euo pipefail produces 0-byte log. Always check /tmp/felt-like-it-build-push.log size; 0 bytes means early exit before first echo.
resolution: Create the missing component file. Check log file size to distinguish 'hook never ran' (no file) from 'script crashed early' (0-byte file) from 'build/push failed' (non-zero file with error).

title: hook-system-simplification
rationale: Eval-protocol graded 16 recommendations; 5 passed correctness+impact+risk gates. Smoke-tested all changes.

name: non-gnu-tail-compat
description: Use tail -n N instead of tail -N in hook commands — non-GNU tail (e.g. uutils-coreutils) rejects the short form

content: CI pipeline builds and pushes Docker images only — no test/lint/check gates. 73 test files + ESLint architectural rules + svelte-check exist but are not enforced at deploy time. Highest-priority QA gap.

title: ci-quality-gate-before-publish
rationale: CI now runs pnpm lint/test/check as a separate job that gates the Docker publish job. Closes FC4 (local quality vs CI enforcement gap).

description: 4 endorheic basins in data pipeline: (1) uploaded files never cleaned — no unlink() in either import path, (2) BullMQ completed/failed jobs accumulate — no removeOnComplete/removeOnFail, (3) import_jobs table no TTL for terminal states, (4) orphaned partial layers from failed imports.
resolution: Requires cleanup jobs for files, BullMQ config for job retention, DB TTL for terminal import_jobs, and cascade-delete for partial layers on import failure.
